nasb.text: Take the choicest of the flock, And also pile wood under the pot. Make it boil vigorously. Also seethe its bones in it.”

esv.text: Take the choicest one of the flock; pile the logs under it; boil it well; seethe also its bones in it.

cnv.text: 要選用羊群中最好的， 把柴堆放在鍋底下， 使鍋沸騰， 把骨頭煮在鍋中。

ccb.text: 要从羊群中选一头上好的羊， 把柴堆在锅下， 烧开锅煮里面的骨头。’”
